title: Hadoop MapReduce Architecture
description: The "tools" directory in the Hadoop MapReduce architecture is responsible for handling command-line arguments and printing out usage information for each command. The directory contains a single Java file, CLI.java, which is the main class for this functionality. The code in CLI.java does not contain any core logic or algorithms, and it does not import any dependencies. The directory does not collaborate with any other files or child directories in the architecture. Therefore, the architectural role of the "tools" directory is to provide a command-line interface for interacting with the Hadoop MapReduce system.
